prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2827名、2026年小幅扩招3.6%（推高位次数字）、本省考生总数大幅增加约32%（推低位次数 字，竞争加剧）以及声誉负面舆情（推高位次数字）等多重因素，扩招与竞争加剧方向相反，但考生增量影响更为显著；预测2026年物理类最低位次约2858名，区间2429–3287名 。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 5302 → 2965 → 3452 → 3345 → 2827, showing a fluctuating but generally advancing trend, stabilizing in the 2800–3500 range in recent three years; the baseline for 2025 is about 2827; from 2021 to 2024, the science enrollment plan was 92 each year, while in 2025 the physics category plan was 83 (due to reform of the college entrance examination mode), and in 2026 the physics category plan is 86, a slight expansion of about 3.6% compared to 2025, easing competition somewhat.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 32nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable around 30th in recent years, belonging to the top-tier engineering powerhouse in China; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is clearly negative, mainly due to a campus peeping incident that triggered 34 negative public opinions, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranking is 87th, with average evaluation and low attention on short video platforms; Light Industry Technology and Engineering A+, Chemical Engineering and Technology A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Environmental Science and Engineering A, Food Science and Engineering A, Architecture A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, with outstanding engineering strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering and automation are all highly recommended popular majors, highly matching the advantageous disciplines of South China University of Technology, with sustained application enthusiasm; the total number of candidates in Yunnan Province in 2026 is 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% compared to the combined total of 285,688 for physics and history categories in 2025, intensifying competition; South China University of Technology is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, which has a certain cross-provincial appeal to Yunnan candidates; the university's enrollment scale in Yunnan is moderate (over 80 in physics category), with no local enrollment proportion data.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 2827, a slight enrollment expansion of 3.6% in 2026 (pushing the ranking number up), a significant increase of about 32% in the total number of candidates in the province (pushing the ranking number down, intensifying competition), and negative reputation public opinion (pushing the ranking number up), the expansion and intensified competition have opposite directions, but the impact of the increase in candidates is more significant; it is predicted that the minimum ranking for the physics category in 2026 will be about 2858, with a range of 2429–3287.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 2429–3287, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Automation, Electrical Engineering, Information Engineering, Mathematics, etc.) as the main choices, with Tier 1 majors (Academician Special Class, Excellent Talent Class, Computer Science) as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors (Chemical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Architecture, etc.) as safe backups. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 2429), one can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: South China University of Technology only has admission data for 2025 in Yunnan Province's liberal arts/history category, with a minimum ranking of approximately 1264; no corresponding subject category admissions were recorded in previous years. The 2025 history category enrollment plan is 10 students, and the 2026 history category plan is 12 students, an expansion of 20% compared to 2025, significantly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 32nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, a top national engineering powerhouse. Although liberal arts majors are not its main focus, they benefit significantly from the overall platform advantages of the university. The 2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly due to campus safety incidents causing public opinion, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranking is 87, with average reviews.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law majors are socially popular (recommended), economics majors are divided (wait and see), accounting is recommended, and business administration majors are clearly discouraged. The estimated number of history category candidates in Yunnan Province for 2026 is approximately 148,900 (at a 39.4% ratio), an increase of about 32% compared to 112,406 in 2025, intensifying competition. South China University of Technology is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, offering some cross-provincial appeal to candidates from the southwestern region. The history category enrollment scale is small (10–12 students), making application popularity relatively concentrated.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 1264, the significant 20% expansion in 2026 (which notably pushes the ranking number upward), and the approximately 32% increase in history category candidates in the province (which pushes the ranking number downward, intensifying competition), the expansion rate is greater than the candidate growth rate, resulting in a slight easing of overall competitive pressure. The predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 history category is approximately 1396, with a range of 1186–1606.
